title: "Add Item" within each column of Kanban view
excerpt: You removed the feature in the kanban view that allowed you to add an item directly in each column. Now you have to go the “add item” blue button in the upper left of the page to add any item. This is less efficient and …

posts.author: brogers (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: You removed the feature in the kanban view that allowed you to add an item directly in each column. Now you have to go the “add item” blue button in the upper left of the page to add any item. This is less efficient and requires additional multiple clicks to accomplish the same task. Can you please bring back the “Add Item” feature within each column of the Kanban view?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Brian

Is this the feature you’re referring to?

Screen Shot 2023-05-15 at 11.54.57 am570×1072 30.3 KB

posts.author: brogers (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, it used to be that you could add a card at the bottom of the column. I didn’t realize they moved it to the top now. This works. Thanks.

posts.author: brogers (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be preferred that the new item be added to the bottom of the stack, not the top
